name: mcp-server-ladybug
description:
MCP server for LadybugDB — the embedded columnar graph database with Cypher query language. Connects to a local LadybugDB database instance and enables AI agents to execute Cypher queries, inspect schemas, and interact with graph data natively.

- Install: pip install mcp-server-ladybug
- GitHub: https://github.com/LadybugDB/mcp-server-ladybug
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/mcp-server-ladybug/
